# ChessRook

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ChessRook;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ChessRook { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
castle, piece, board game

## Categories
gaming, emoji

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/chess-rook)
